# Instance 1
# Instance: 08-sift_vf-omp_image_height_640_image_width_800

    NAME "08-sift_vf-omp_image_height_640_image_width_800"
    EXPERIMENT_SET "regression"
    APPLICATION_DIR "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/../.."
    ENTRY "08-sift"
    SCHEDULER "vf-omp"
    PARAMETERS "image_height=640" "image_width=800"
    BUILD_DIR "${CMAKE_BINARY_DIR}/08-sift/regression/08-sift_vf-omp_image_height_640_image_width_800"
    DEFINES "IMAGE_HEIGHT=640" "IMAGE_WIDTH=800" "SCHEDULER_IARA" "VERBOSE"
    LINKER_ARGS "-lm"
    TIMEOUT "300"
)
